# Will Aesoph
> Will Aesoph is a Canadian web developer helping businesses with custom websites, technical SEO, and digital growth.

Website: https://aesoph.ca
Email: willaesoph@gmail.com

## Primary Pages
- [About](https://aesoph.ca/): Custom websites, web strategy, and technical SEO from Will Aesoph. View recent work and connect for new projects.
- [Work](https://aesoph.ca/work): Explore web development projects and case studies spanning website rebuilds, lead generation, and scalable content systems.
- [Contact](https://aesoph.ca/contact): Start a project with Will Aesoph. Reach out for website development, technical SEO, and digital growth support.

## Featured Case Studies
- [Athens Creek Retirement Lodge](https://aesoph.ca/work/athens-creek): Created a focused retirement-lodge website strategy designed to capture qualified leads quickly and clearly.
- [CoreCare](https://aesoph.ca/work/corecare): Delivered a complete website build for CoreCare from design through launch, with a focus on speed and reliability.
- [Vancouver Convention Centre](https://aesoph.ca/work/vancouver-convention-centre): Developed reusable templates and content tooling for a 500+ page website to reduce publishing friction.
- [PARC Retirement Living](https://aesoph.ca/work/parcliving): Refactored a multi-site platform into a maintainable, version-controlled system while preserving user experience.

## Services
- Custom website design and development
- Website rebuilds and migration projects
- On-page technical SEO improvements
- Performance optimization and accessibility
- Analytics, lead generation, and web strategy
